title: Goof Off
description:
In Goof Off, you play as creatures called Goofs who have decided to go to a strange underground warehouse and fight it out. 

Pick up weapons and start readying for a battle you won't forget!

Face your opponents with more than 50 Weapons• Pull out a strangely realistic-looking gun to shoot down your foes

• Steal your opponent's weapon by grabbing it with a plunger

• Set up mines to lock off areas of the maps

• Fire lasers through walls to stop your cowardly foe from running away

• And since Goofs are secretly amebas, you can send them flying at your enemies, and gain victory

Change your play style with costumes!Costume crates are another type of crate that will spawn in the underground warehouse, which will boost your abilities in wacky ways!

• The Bunny will leap into the sky and avoid its enemy's fire

• Tanks have increased Vitality and will not fall

• The Wampire(yes, with a W) will drain all life force from anyone it attacks

And more costumes to help Goof Off!

You may also find yourself located in unique places underground, with many obstacles• Jump over lava and try not to fry yourself

• Spikes that are pointy. Just a bit.

• Water-filled rooms, but worry not, Goofs don't need oxygen

Find your way around and use these traps to help succeed in victory!

Special Events May HappenRandomly throughout your matches, the whole arena becomes even more chaotic with silly abilities

You May Encounter 

• Super Speed

• Anti Gravity

• Everything is Explosive

• AND MANY MORE!

Note:• You can play with a mix of both keyboard and controllers, so have fun!

• There is no true single-player option in Goof Off, so bring more people to goof off with you!
description_short: This is a Party/Couch game where wild Goofs fight for glory! Grab weapons from crates and battle your friends and family to be crowned the ultimate Goof! You may find a fish that knocks the wind out of others or a bottle containing a black hole. You never know what you may find...
